0001-net-p2p-bazarr-Update-to-1.2.4.patch

poudriere ok
runs in production on my systems (13.2 amd64)

Since this update fixes a lot of authentication errors with the OpenSubtitles provider, I would like this one to be merged back into quarterly.
Basically all versions before 1.2.4 will at some moment start throwing auth errors.
